plugins.name: dev-team
plugins.description: Core development team: designer, backend engineer, frontend engineer, and QA/tester. Context-aware, not product-specific.

skills.description: Senior product designer — reads existing design system and user context before proposing. Implements in the project's stack.
Senior backend engineer — layered architecture, TDD-first, security-aware. Laravel/PHP primary.
Senior frontend engineer — React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind, Inertia.js.
QA engineer / TDD lead — test case definition, coverage review, framework-agnostic.

plugins.name: product
plugins.description: Product and squad management: PM for discovery/prioritization, manager for orchestrating the full team.

skills.description: Senior product manager — translates user problems into scoped, prioritized work. Reads project context before opining.
Squad orchestrator — routes requests, enforces quality gates, never implements code.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security review team: offensive (red-team) and defensive (blue-team) gates.

skills.description: Adversary simulation, kill chain analysis, exploitation path modeling. Gate before every merge.
Detection engineering, audit trail completeness, IR readiness, hardening. Gate before every merge.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Cross-cutting engineering roles: architect, DevOps, and git/CI standards.

skills.description: Software architect — code quality, design decisions, performance, scalability review.
DevOps/SRE — CI/CD, IaC, GitOps, cost optimization, infra incidents.
Git discipline, CI hygiene, commit and PR message standards.
